62ead0be8c91030f69d5b6f4.leadin_sanitized: After having a dream interpreted by a fortune teller in this novel, Santiago travels to the pyramids of Egypt. For 10 points each:
parts: On his journey to the pyramids, Santiago travels with this title character. A work by Ben Jonson also has this title.
This Brazilian author wrote The Alchemist.
Santiago works in this profession in Andalusia. He sells his sheep on the advice of Melchizedek at the beginning of his travels.
